message:
fix: auto-resize terminals with ResizeObserver (#106)

Replace window resize listener with ResizeObserver on terminal
containers. This ensures terminals automatically fit() to their
container whenever it resizes — on initial load, window resize,
and tile/untile transitions. Fixes terminals not filling the
viewing area on initial load.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@kubestellar.io>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
